assertions.expectation: Recommends increasing maxSurge for CPU pools (e.g., 10-20) to parallelize node replacements, with justification for the value
assertions.reason: Response recommends maxSurge of 8 for CPU pools (calculated as 5% of 150 nodes per pool) and explains this parallelizes replacements

assertions.expectation: For GPU pools with fixed reservations: recommends increasing maxUnavailable (not maxSurge) as the primary lever since surge capacity is typically unavailable
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states GPU pools with fixed reservations have NO surge capacity and recommends maxUnavailable of 3 as the primary lever

assertions.expectation: Advises checking and requesting increased compute quota before the upgrade for CPU pools
assertions.reason: Response does not mention checking or requesting increased compute quota before upgrades

assertions.expectation: Suggests staggering node pool upgrades or running non-conflicting pools in parallel
assertions.reason: Response provides a pool upgrade sequencing section that recommends upgrading CPU pools first, then GPU pools, with specific gcloud commands

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE's auto-scale blue-green upgrade strategy as an option for GPU pools
assertions.reason: Response mentions autoscaled blue-green strategy for inference workloads on GPU pools and provides the gcloud command with blue-green configuration

assertions.expectation: Recommends expanding the maintenance window or splitting across multiple weekends
assertions.reason: Response provides two options: split maintenance windows across weekends and longer weekend windows (36-hour window Friday through Sunday)

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command for updating surge settings on each pool
assertions.reason: Response provides specific gcloud container node-pools update commands for both CPU and GPU pools with appropriate surge/unavailable settings

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to track upgrade progress in real-time
assertions.reason: Response includes a monitoring section with commands to track node status, operations list, and check for stuck pods during upgrades
